records.name_en: XF-504 Semi-gloss blue polyimide PCB label material (1 mil)
records.name_zh: XF-504 半光泽蓝色聚酰亚胺 PCB 标签材料（1 mil）
records.facestock_en: 1 mil (25 μm) Polyimide, semi-gloss blue finish
records.facestock_zh: 1 mil (25 μm) 聚酰亚胺(PI)，半光泽蓝色
records.adhesive_zh: 1 mil (25 μm) 丙烯酸胶粘剂
records.application_en: PCB identification and tracking; electronic component tracking; asset tracking; warranty labeling through multi-pass reflow and wave solder processes
records.application_zh: PCB标识与追溯；电子元器件追踪；资产追踪；保修标签；可经受多次回流焊和波峰焊工艺
features_en: Resists highly corrosive, highly active fluxes
features_zh: 1 mil (25 μm) 聚酰亚胺(PI)薄膜
半光泽蓝色面层
高温下尺寸稳定
不泛黄、不软化的耐磨面涂层
耐强腐蚀性高活性助焊剂
强力丙烯酸压敏胶(PSA)
可热转印打印
benefits_en: Maintains barcode integrity and readability through the harshest multi-cycle PCB manufacturing processes
Remains firmly affixed through multiple passes at extreme temperatures and concentrated cleaning chemistries
High contrast printed barcodes remain readable post heat
benefits_zh: 在最严苛的多周期PCB制造工艺中保持条码完整性和可读性
在极端温度和高浓度清洗化学品中多次过炉仍牢固粘附
高对比度打印条码在受热后仍可读

features_en: Next-gen coating engineered for improved heat, chemical and flux resistance
Optimized for crisp, high-contrast thermal transfer (TTR) printing
features_zh: 哑光白色聚酰亚胺，1 mil
面向PCB的耐久性与可打印性
新一代涂层，耐热、耐化学品及耐助焊剂性能提升
为清晰高对比热转印(TTR)打印优化
美国制造
benefits_en: 72% improvement in flux solder performance vs. legacy line (validated in testing)
15% improvement in cleaner resistance vs. legacy line, helping labels survive high-pressure washes
Maintains small-font and barcode readability through reflow and cleaning
Labels stay put and remain readable at elevated temperatures
benefits_zh: 助焊剂焊接性能较上一代提升72%（经测试验证）
耐清洗剂性能提升15%，标签可耐受高压清洗
小字体和条码在回流焊与清洗后仍可读
高温下标签牢固且保持可读
records.temperature_performance: Up to 100 hours at 302 °F (150 °C), 5 minutes at 500 °F (260 °C), 90 seconds at 572 °F (300 °C) (typical performance; use case dependent, see TDS)
